steps.title: Identify the contrast in Green's responses
steps.content: Green found the 2016 version confusing but praised the 2019 version enthusiastically. The words "However" and "This suggests" signal that the passage is pointing to a change in the show itself that explains the shift in his reaction.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to each choice
steps.content:
• A: says 2016 had fewer storytelling problems than 2019 -- this directly contradicts the passage, where Green found 2016 confusing and 2019 praiseworthy.
  • B: addresses production size rather than storytelling -- off-topic from the storytelling contrast the passage emphasizes.
  • C: reverses the actual contrast -- Green enthusiastically praised 2019, not 2016, and found 2016 confusing, not 2019.
  • D: correctly captures the implied improvement in storytelling from 2016 to 2019, which explains why Green went from confused to enthusiastic.

That is the correct answer.
